subcodes.first_line: O thou who art the mystery of thy father and the love of thy Most Glorious Lord! Two letters have been received and an answer shall be dispatched [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من هو سر ابیه و حب ربه الابهی دو قطعه رسائل واصل و جواب ارسال میشود در
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @wisdom [hikmat], @humility; meekness; lowliness, @unity; oneness of humanity
